system.description: The Librarian encases one of his foes in a crackling cage of lightning, searing his flesh and contorting his muscles. This power may only be used against a single target. The target suffers 1d10 Energy damage x PR counting as having the Shock Quality (see page 144). If this power is sustained, the target suffers 2d10 Energy damage in each of the Librarian's turns.
